The AHCAH data file set contains two files, a Hospital file and a Patient file, both of which are provided as a set with an approved research request and signed data use agreement. The Patient file contains a record for each AHCAH admission for the patient and includes other beneficiary-specific data such as the beneficiary’s program eligibility status (Medicare, Medicaid, Dual) and the state Medicaid identifier, if applicable.
